questions.questionText: What is the volume formula for a perfect sphere with radius r?

How many vertices does a standard cube possess?

What is the sum of the interior angles of a regular hexagon?
According to Brahmagupta's formula, what does it calculate?

What is the area of a circle with a diameter of 10?
Which theorem states that the square of the hypotenuse is equal to the sum of squares of the other two sides?
In how many ways can 4 people be seated in a straight line?
What is the value of the combinatorial coefficient C(5, 2)?
How many distinct subsets can be formed from a set containing 5 elements?
Which principle is also known as the Dirichlet Box Principle?

If events A and B are independent, what is P(A and B)?
What is the probability of flipping a fair coin three times and getting all heads?
What does Bayes' Theorem calculate?
What is the sum of probabilities of all possible mutually exclusive outcomes in a sample space?
Which logical connective represents an 'exclusive or' (XOR)?
wrong: At least one input is true

questions.questionText: What is the negation of the statement 'All primes are odd'?
questions.correct: There exists at least one prime that is not odd

questions.questionText: What is a logical statement called if it evaluates to true under all possible truth value assignments?
If P is true and Q is false, what is the truth value of the implication P -> Q?
What logic law simplifies 'not (A and B)' into '(not A) or (not B)'?
